original_code:
module TopModule (
    input [1:0] dividend,
    input [1:0] divisor,
    output reg [1:0] quotient,
    output reg [1:0] remainder
);

    always @(*) begin
        if (divisor == 0) begin
            quotient = 2'b00; // Handle division by zero case
            remainder = dividend; // Remainder is the dividend
        end else begin
            quotient = dividend / divisor;
            remainder = dividend % divisor;
        end
    end

endmodule
adversarial_code:
module TopModule (
    input [1:0] dividend,
    input [1:0] divisor,
    output reg [1:0] quotient,
    output reg [1:0] remainder
);
    
    always @(*) begin
        if (divisor == 0) begin
            quotient = 2'b00; // Handle division by zero case
            remainder = dividend; // Remainder is the dividend
        end else begin
            quotient = dividend / divisor;
            remainder = dividend % divisor;
        end
    end
endmodule
